children.heading: Requirement
children.label: a Requirement
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct demonstrations of critical technologies, preferably in self-contained locations, so that technical and non-technical parameters can be evaluated to best determine commercial applicability of the technology.

children.heading: Small-scale demonstrations
children.label: b Small-scale demonstrations
children.text: Concurrently with activities conducted pursuant to , the Secretary shall conduct small-scale demonstrations of hydrogen technology at self-contained sites.section 12403 of this title

children.heading: Non-Federal funding
children.label: c Non-Federal funding
children.text: The Secretary shall require a commitment from non-Federal sources of at least 50 percent of the cost of any demonstration conducted under this section.
